overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character walking through a rainy night in an old western town. The character moves from a covered sidewalk past street lamps and buildings, through an open courtyard, and along a covered porch before running toward an approaching vehicle on a dirt road.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered wooden sidewalk next to a building with striped awnings

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with white and gray striped awnings and dark siding
ornate black street lamp with warm yellow glow illuminating the rain
lush green plants with orange flowers in garden beds
wooden picket fence running along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden sidewalk during a heavy downpour at night. A two-story building with striped awnings lines the right side while tropical vegetation and a wooden fence border the left. Warm street lamps cast yellow light through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining courtyard with stairs leading to lower level

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open courtyard with outdoor seating and tables
character descends wooden stairs to lower ground level

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard and descending wooden stairs to a lower level

entered.detail: wooden tables and chairs with large umbrellas arranged on patio
wooden staircase with railings leading down to lower elevation
large mature tree with spreading branches in courtyard center

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered walkway, the character enters an open courtyard exposed to the heavy rain. Outdoor dining tables with umbrellas line the left side. The character approaches and descends a wooden staircase on the right, moving to a lower level while passing a large central tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy area between historic buildings

events.description: transitions from paved courtyard to open grassy field with muddy ground

agents.ego_description: walking across the open grassy area toward a large mansion building visible on the right

entered.detail: large two-story wooden mansion with multiple lit windows and ornate architecture
trees with hanging spanish moss silhouetted against the night sky
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open grassy field in the rain, heading toward a large illuminated mansion on the right. Spanish moss hangs from trees on the left, and wooden utility poles stand in the distance. The ground is muddy and wet from the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden porch of mansion with striped awnings

events.description: steps onto covered wooden porch of the mansion, gaining shelter from rain
moving under porch roof changes lighting from moonlight to warm artificial lantern light

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered porch with striped awnings overhead, passing wall-mounted lanterns

entered.detail: covered wooden walkway with support posts and railings along the mansion front
white and gray striped canvas awning extending over the porch
wall-mounted lantern with warm yellow glow illuminating the wooden deck

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the covered wooden porch of the large mansion, gaining shelter from the rain. Striped awnings extend overhead while warm wall-mounted lanterns illuminate the wooden deck. The mansion wall is now on the left as the character walks along the porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy dirt road with approaching vehicle

events.description: exits covered porch onto open dirt road exposed to rain
vehicle with bright headlights approaches from the distance on the dirt road
character accelerates to a run toward the approaching vehicle

agents.ego_description: running across the muddy dirt road toward an approaching vehicle with bright headlights

notable_agents.action: early automobile or carriage with two bright headlights approaching through the rain

entered.detail: muddy dirt road with puddles reflecting the vehicle headlights
vehicle with two bright white headlights approaching through the storm

segments.scene_description: Exiting the porch shelter, the character enters an open dirt road as heavy rain continues. A vehicle with bright headlights approaches from the distance. The character begins running toward the vehicle as its headlights illuminate the muddy road surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched town at night, transitioning from sheltered walkways to open muddy terrain and finally toward an approaching vehicle. It begins along a covered wooden sidewalk lined with striped awnings and warm street lamps before the character steps out into an open courtyard exposed to the heavy downpour. As the character descends a wooden staircase and passes a large central tree, the scene expands into a muddy grassy field where Spanish moss hangs from the trees and a large illuminated mansion looms to the right. The camera then follows the character onto the mansion's covered porch, shifting from the open storm to the warm glow of wall-mounted lanterns and overhead awnings. Finally, the character exits the shelter and enters a dirt road, running toward the bright headlights of an approaching vehicle that cut through the falling rain.
